home.title: Start with the right service and move into a clearer enquiry
home.body: If you already know which technical line you need, go straight into the service. If you are still comparing options, review the company or move to contact with more context.

servicesIndex.title: Compare services and choose the contact route that fits best
servicesIndex.body: Each card summarises one technical line. If you prefer to explain the need directly, you can move to contact or review the company first.

journey.title: Turn this need into a well-focused enquiry
journey.body: You can explain the case through contact, return to the service index to compare options or review the company before deciding the next step.

related.title: Solutions that are often reviewed together with this service
related.body: These links help connect technical needs that are often raised within the same enquiry.

faqCta.title: If you need a more precise assessment, contact is the next step
faqCta.body: When the answer depends on the space, the existing installation or a combination of services, the best approach is to explain the case by phone, WhatsApp or form.

about.title: After the company context, the natural route moves to service and contact
about.body: Once you understand the Instal Berrozpe approach, you can enter the most relevant service or write directly to explain the need.

contact.title: If you are still unsure between services, here is a quick route
contact.body: You can review the three confirmed services, learn more about the company or call directly if you prefer to solve the first doubt by phone.
